data.title: Experian Continues Share Buyback as Part of Capital Management Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Experian ( (GB:EXPN) ).

Experian plc, the global data and technology group listed on the London Stock Exchange, provides data, analytics and software solutions across financial services, healthcare, automotive, agrifinance, insurance and other sectors. Headquartered in Dublin and employing more than 25,000 people in 33 countries, the FTSE 100 company focuses on enabling smarter lending, combating fraud and helping consumers manage their financial lives.

The company disclosed that, under its ongoing share repurchase programme, it bought 184,232 ordinary shares on 10 April 2026 on the London Stock Exchange at an average price of 2,607.7388 pence per share, with the shares to be cancelled. The buyback, executed through Goldman Sachs International and with transactions to be posted weekly on Experian’s website, signals continued capital management efforts that reduce the share count and may enhance earnings per share for investors.

This latest tranche of purchases reflects the group’s broader strategy of returning surplus capital to shareholders while maintaining investment in technology and talent. The ongoing nature of the programme underscores management’s confidence in Experian’s cash generation and long‑term growth prospects in its core data and analytics markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:EXPN) stock is a Buy with a £4000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Experian stock, see the GB:EXPN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EXPN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EXPN is a Outperform.

Experian’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call sentiment are the most significant factors driving the stock score. However, technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, and the high P/E ratio indicates potential overvaluation. The company’s proactive share repurchase program positively impacts shareholder value.

To see Spark’s full report on EXPN stock, click here.

More about Experian

Experian plc is a global data and technology company that uses data, analytics and software to support lending, fight fraud, simplify healthcare, deliver digital marketing and provide insights in the automotive sector, among others. Listed on the London Stock Exchange and a member of the FTSE 100, it operates across financial services, healthcare, automotive, agrifinance and insurance markets, employing over 25,000 people in 33 countries from its Dublin headquarters.

The company focuses on helping consumers achieve financial goals while enabling businesses to harness data through investment in talent and advanced technologies. Its broad market footprint and emphasis on innovation position Experian as a key infrastructure provider in multiple data‑intensive industries worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: -23.27%

Average Trading Volume: 4,336,969

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £23.07B

data.title: Coppa Collective Completes Four-Site Linwood Collection Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Various Eateries PLC ADR ( (GB:COPC) ) has shared an announcement.

Coppa Collective plc has completed the acquisition of The Wellington Arms in Hampshire, finalising its previously announced purchase of four pub and hotel sites from Grosvenor Pubs and Inns. The properties, which together form The Linwood Collection and will retain their existing names and identities, include Wild Thyme & Honey in the Cotswolds, The Hare & Hounds in Berkshire, The Stag on the River in Surrey, and The Wellington Arms in Hampshire.

The deal strengthens Coppa Collective’s premium pubs-with-rooms offering and expands the scale of The Linwood Collection within its broader hospitality portfolio. The group has also agreed terms to potentially acquire The Queen’s Head in Surrey, although that transaction remains subject to the outcome of an asset of community value process and statutory moratorium, with the company planning to update the market once there is further progress.

Spark’s Take on COPC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COPC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak profitability and higher leverage despite strong revenue growth and improved cash generation. Technicals are mildly supportive in the short term (price above key shorter moving averages), while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on COPC stock, click here.

More about Various Eateries PLC ADR

Coppa Collective plc is a premium, multi-format hospitality group operating in the United Kingdom. The company runs three core brands across 24 locations: Coppa Club, an all-day multi-use restaurant, bar and workspace concept; The Linwood Collection, a portfolio of premium pubs with rooms; and Noci, a modern pasta-led dining concept focused on high-quality dishes at accessible prices.

Average Trading Volume: 61,015

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: £24.51M

data.title: Ondo’s LeakBot Wins Major Scale-Up With Denmark’s Alm. Brand Group
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ondo InsurTech Plc ( (GB:ONDO) ) has issued an announcement.

Ondo InsurTech Plc has secured a significant expansion of its LeakBot deployment with Denmark’s Alm. Brand Group, which will now offer the leak-detection device to up to 160,000 homeowners across its Alm. Brand, Codan and Privatsikring brands. The move builds on an earlier commitment to distribute at least 15,000 devices and underscores Denmark’s status as a strategically important, high-performing market for Ondo.

The enlarged programme signals growing insurer confidence in LeakBot’s ability to prevent costly water damage claims, reinforcing Ondo’s positioning as a key partner for home insurers seeking to reduce loss ratios and improve customer value. For stakeholders, the scale-up suggests potential for higher recurring device deployments, deeper carrier relationships and further momentum in the company’s international rollout of its claims-prevention technology.

Spark’s Take on ONDO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONDO is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality (widening losses, collapsing gross margin, cash burn, negative equity and leverage) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Positive commercial traction and management alignment from recent corporate events provide some offset, but valuation signals are not supportive based on the provided P/E and missing dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ONDO stock, click here.

More about Ondo InsurTech Plc

Ondo InsurTech Plc is a London-listed provider of claims-prevention technology for home insurers, focused on its patented LeakBot device, which detects household water leaks via a self-install sensor linked to a mobile app and engineer support. Operating with 26 carrier partners across Europe and the U.S., the company targets the large and costly segment of water damage claims and holds the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark for deriving most revenues from green activities.

Average Trading Volume: 528,465

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £21.35M

data.title: Thorney Technologies’ NTA Slips Amid Geopolitical Volatility as Buyback Activity Ramps Up
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Thorney Technologies Limited ( (AU:TEK) ) has issued an announcement.

Thorney Technologies reported a pre-tax net tangible asset backing of 22.4 cents per share at 31 March 2026, down from 24.3 cents a month earlier, as heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and associated market volatility weighed on its portfolio. The LIC’s investment performance for the month was -7.82%, with a portfolio split of 58% listed securities, 37% unlisted holdings and 5% cash, and management remained active in monitoring portfolio composition and trading opportunities.

In response to the share price trading at a discount to NTA, the company continued its on-market share buyback, purchasing 1,487,543 shares during the period ahead of the program’s November 2026 expiry. Thorney Investment Group and its associates maintained a 31.6% stake in the company, and the manager reiterated its focus on identifying opportunities amid market dislocation while pursuing absolute returns over the medium to long term for shareholders.

More about Thorney Technologies Limited

Thorney Technologies Ltd is an ASX-listed listed investment company focused on technology-related investments across all stages of the investment lifecycle. Managed by Thorney Investment Group, it targets early-stage and disruptive businesses in sectors such as fintech, e-commerce, education, agriculture, medical technology, telecommunications, robotics and AI, sourcing deal flow from Australia, Israel and the U.S.

YTD Price Performance: -12.50%

Average Trading Volume: 244,306

data.title: Jyske Bank Expands Treasury Stake Under Ongoing DKK 3 Billion Share Buyback
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jyske Bank A/S ( (GB:0MGD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Jyske Bank is executing a share repurchase programme running from 5 February 2026 to 29 January 2027, under which it plans to buy back shares worth up to DKK 3 billion in compliance with EU Safe Harbour rules. During week 15 of 2026, the bank repurchased additional shares, bringing total accumulated buybacks under the programme to 649,277 shares at an average price of DKK 908.60 and raising its treasury shareholding to 3,958,805 shares, or 6.44% of its share capital, underscoring active capital management that can support earnings per share and shareholder value.

The latest weekly transactions saw Jyske Bank acquire blocks of roughly 13,000 shares per trading day, with transaction values around DKK 12 million each day. The growing treasury position reflects continued execution of the authorised buyback capacity and may influence the bank’s share liquidity and capital structure, with implications for existing shareholders as the programme progresses.

More about Jyske Bank A/S

Jyske Bank A/S is a Danish financial institution operating in the banking sector, offering a broad range of banking and financial services. The bank focuses on both retail and corporate customers in Denmark and related markets, and actively manages its capital structure, including through share repurchase programmes.

See more insights into 0MGD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Macquarie Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Healius
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Macquarie Group Limited ( (AU:MQG) ) has shared an announcement.

Macquarie Group Limited has lodged a notice with Healius Limited confirming that it has ceased to be a substantial holder in the healthcare company. The filing indicates that Macquarie and its controlled entities have reduced their relevant voting interests in Healius below the substantial holding threshold, signaling a withdrawal of its previous significant shareholder position.

The notice, signed by company secretary Simone Kovacic on 13 April 2026, lists Macquarie Group Limited, Macquarie Investment Management Australia Limited and Macquarie Bank Limited as involved entities. This change in shareholding may alter the investor base and governance dynamics at Healius, as one of its major institutional investors steps back from a substantial ownership role.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MQG) stock is a Hold with a A$220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Macquarie Group Limited stock, see the AU:MQG Stock Forecast page.

More about Macquarie Group Limited

Macquarie Group Limited is a global financial services provider based in Sydney, Australia. Through its various controlled entities, the group offers investment management, banking, asset management, and specialist financial services across multiple markets and sectors.

MFF Capital Investments Ltd. ( (AU:MFF) ) has issued an announcement.

MFF Capital Investments Ltd. reported an unaudited group net tangible asset value of approximately $4.711 per share pre-tax, including a 10 cent fully franked interim dividend, and $4.055 per share post-tax as at 10 April 2026. Net cash represented about 2.3% of total investment assets at that date, with the interim dividend scheduled to trade ex-dividend on 21 April 2026 and be paid on 13 May 2026, signalling continued capital returns and providing investors with updated visibility on the company’s portfolio value.

The reported NTA compares with $5.021 per share at 30 June 2025, indicating a decline in asset backing over the period that may reflect market movements or portfolio changes. The relatively low net cash position suggests MFF remains largely invested, a stance that can influence risk and return dynamics for shareholders depending on future market conditions and portfolio performance.

More about MFF Capital Investments Ltd.

MFF Capital Investments Ltd. is an Australian listed investment company that manages a portfolio of investment assets and net cash on behalf of shareholders, reporting net tangible assets per share as a key performance indicator. data.title: RENOVA Lifts Power Sales in March as Output Curtailment Impact Stays Limited
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from RENOVA ( (JP:9519) ) is now available.

RENOVA reported March 2026 electricity sales of 318,042,714 kWh from its renewable power portfolio in Japan, exceeding its internal plan by 5.4% and marking a 50.8% year-on-year increase. For the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, total electricity sales reached 3,266,952,721 kWh, while output curtailment instructions from utilities in March led to only a minor 0.270% loss versus the annual revenue plan, indicating limited financial impact and demonstrating the resilience of RENOVA’s generation business despite grid constraints.

The company currently operates 13 solar, 7 biomass and 1 geothermal plant domestically, with combined generation capacity of roughly 821.6 MW at month-end March. Management noted that its full-year sales planning already incorporates output control and weather-related risks, suggesting that the latest curtailments and scheduled biomass maintenance outages are unlikely to materially alter guidance or disrupt overall operational performance.

More about RENOVA

RENOVA, Inc. is a Japan-based renewable energy developer and operator listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company focuses on utility-scale solar, biomass and geothermal power plants, generating electricity under long-term fixed-price power purchase agreements in the domestic market.

YTD Price Performance: 37.96%

Average Trading Volume: 1,127,688

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Viva Energy Group Ltd. ( (AU:VEA) ) has issued an announcement.

Viva Energy Group Limited, a major Australian convenience retail, fuel supply and energy infrastructure operator, runs over 1,280 retail stores and supplies nearly 1,550 service stations nationwide. The company also owns the Geelong Refinery in Victoria and manages a broad network of terminals and aviation, marine, bitumen, chemicals, polymers and lubricants facilities across the country.

Viva Energy has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for Thursday, 21 May 2026 at 2:30pm Melbourne time, to be held both in person in Melbourne and virtually. The notice of meeting, along with proxy, shareholder question and online meeting guides, has been released, outlining the framework for shareholder participation and governance engagement ahead of the AGM.
